plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to eliminate their high risk.
Increase position in QQQI, our income ETF, to boost steady distributions.
Trim SPY from 32% to 20% to address concentration and free up capital.
Add a new position in MSFT, a strong scanner setup, for quality exposure.
Trim CRWD from 14% to 10% to further reduce single-stock risk.
Hold remaining cash and quality names for capital preservation.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of ~1.5% per month. It prioritizes reducing leverage and concentration, holding a larger cash buffer, and focusing on income and quality names to minimize drawdowns.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to reduce overall risk.
Trim SPY to 25% and QQQ to 10% to meet concentration mandates.
Add MSFT, a high-scoring scanner opportunity, for quality tech exposure.
Add COP, another strong scanner setup, to diversify into a different sector.
Maintain a balanced mix of broad index, quality tech, and income.
This plan seeks risk-first growth with a target of ~2.5% per month, balancing exposure reduction with adding new opportunities.
balanced.read: This plan targets ~2.5% per month with a risk-first approach. It reduces leverage and concentration while adding new, high-quality scanner setups. Expect moderate growth with controlled drawdowns, maintaining a cash buffer for opportunities.

plan: Add to SOXL, increasing leveraged ETF exposure for aggressive growth.
Trim SPY to 20% and QQQ to 10% to free up capital for high-conviction plays.
Increase CRWD to 20%, doubling down on a strong performer.
Add MSFT, a top-tier scanner setup, to capture upside in quality tech.
Add COP, another high-potential scanner name, to diversify aggressive bets.
This plan aims for aggressive growth targeting ~4% per month, leaning heavily into leverage and concentrated top performers, accepting higher potential drawdowns.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% per month, embracing higher leverage and concentration in top-scoring names and leveraged ETFs like SOXL. It accepts significantly higher potential drawdowns and the daily rebalancing decay of leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is paramount.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta single names (CRWD, SMH) to eliminate volatility.
Significantly increase QQQI to 40%, prioritizing its monthly income distributions.
Add SPY to 30% for stability and broad market exposure within the income focus.
Hold remaining cash for stability and to park capital for yield.
This plan focuses on generating steady monthly income, targeting ~1% per month.
It prioritizes low drawdowns and reliable distributions over growth, treating capital as a yield-generating asset.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets ~1% per month by prioritizing monthly distributions from ETFs like QQQI and stable broad index exposure like SPY. It cuts all leverage and high-beta assets to minimize volatility and preserve capital, aiming for reliable income over growth.
